title: Elytra Remover
description: Elytra Remover is a Minecraft Fabric mod that disables Elytra by removing it from loot tables, crafting recipes, player inventories, and usage, while notifying players if they attempt to use or obtain an Elytra.
body: **Elytra Remover** is a Minecraft Fabric mod that **disables Elytra** by **removing it** from **loot tables**, **crafting recipes**, **player inventories**, and usage, while **notifying players** if they **attempt to use** or **obtain** an Elytra.
